Simple Routine

How It Works

No complicated settings. No clinic visits. Just 3 easy steps and 20 minutes of your day.

1

Wear the Cap

Place LumiScalp on your head. The adjustable strap fits all head sizes comfortably for men and women.

2

Press Power Once

A single button press activates all 272 LEDs at the precise 650nm wavelength. No settings to configure.

3

Relax 20 Minutes

The cap auto-shuts off after 20 minutes. Use it daily while reading, watching TV, or working at your desk.
